tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Get compact daily historical price trends for a product, optionally scoped to one retailer. Includes the recorded low, high, average, coverage dates, and observation count.

tools.name: find_best_price
tools.description: Find the cheapest currently available in-stock or pre-order price for a product across all retailers.

tools.name: compare_prices
tools.description: Compare a product's current price across all retailers.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search the sealed MTG catalogue by product name, set name, ID, or category. Descriptive words such as 'sealed products' are accepted.

tools.name: get_upcoming_releases
tools.description: Get upcoming MTG release schedule with confirmed dates.

tools.name: find_deals
tools.description: Find MTG products currently priced below average market price.

tools.name: get_price_range
tools.description: Get the lowest, highest, and average recorded price for a product.

tools.name: find_in_stock
tools.description: Find MTG products currently in stock or pre-order.

tools.name: get_set_products
tools.description: Get all products in a specific MTG set with current prices.

tools.name: get_retailer_products
tools.description: Get products available at a specific retailer.

tools.name: get_price_drops
tools.description: Find MTG products that dropped in price recently. Useful for answering 'what dropped in price' or 'price drops in last N hours'.

tools.name: find_recently_restocked
tools.description: Find MTG products that recently became available (restocked or new listings). Useful for 'what just came back in stock' or 'recently restocked'.

tools.name: find_overpriced
tools.description: Find MTG products priced above average market price. Useful for 'what is overpriced' or 'which products are expensive compared to market'.

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific MTG product from the official catalog, including description, contents, features, and release date. Useful for 'what is in this product', 'tell me about X', or 'what does a booster box contain'.
